title: NPTEL IoT 2025 JULY

questions.question: Which of the following is/are not a thing as per IoT?
questions.detailed_solution: All of these are things as per IoT
questions.reference: See lecture 1 (Introduction to IoT - Part - I) @ 02:15

questions.question: State true or false. Statement: The things in IoT consist of embedded systems.
questions.detailed_solution: The things in IoT consist of embedded systems.
questions.reference: See lecture 1 (Introduction to IoT - Part - I) @ 04:15

questions.question: State whether the following statement is True or False. Statement: IoT is one of the technologies that enable smart farms.
questions.detailed_solution: IoT is one of the technologies that enable smart farms.
questions.reference: See lecture 2 (Introduction to IoT - Part - II) @ 05:27

questions.question: State whether the following statement is True or False. Statement: In M2M, it is mandatory that the interactions between the machines and devices happen through a cloud computing infrastructure.
questions.detailed_solution:
In M2M, the interactions between the machines and devices can
happen through a cloud computing infrastructure.
questions.reference: See lecture 1 (Introduction to IoT - Part - I) @ 33:22

questions.question: Sometimes, when there is a need for the nodes to communicate directly to the Internet, ______________ can be used.
questions.detailed_solution:
Sometimes, there is a need for the nodes to communicate directly to the
Internet. This is achieved by tunneling.
questions.reference: See lecture 2 (Introduction to IoT - Part - II) @ 11:44

questions.question: State whether the following statement is true or false. Statement: In multi-homing a node/network is connected to only two networks for improved reliability.
questions.detailed_solution:
In multi-homing, a node/network is connected to multiple networks for
improved reliability.
questions.reference: See lecture 2 (Introduction to IoT - Part - II) @ 15:22

questions.question: Which of the following is/are not enablers of IoT?
questions.detailed_solution:
The enablers of IoT are -
a. RFID
b. Nanotechnology
c. Sensors
questions.reference: See lecture 1 (Introduction to IoT - Part - I) @ 12:41

questions.question: State whether the following statement is True or False. Statement: The decreasing number of devices in IoT is expected to result in an address crunch.
questions.detailed_solution:
The increasing number of devices in IoT is expected to result in an address
crunch.
questions.reference: See lecture 2 (Introduction to IoT - Part - II) @ 01:19

questions.question: Why IoT has become so popular?

options.text: It can provide advanced level of services to the society
It can help reduce human effort
It can potentially make processes more efficient

questions.detailed_solution:
IoT has become popular as -
● It can provide advanced level of services to the society
● It can help reduce human effort
● It can potentially make processes more efficient
questions.reference: See lecture 1 (Introduction to IoT - Part - I) @ 03:15

questions.question: State whether the following statement is true or false. The resolution of a sensor is the maximum change it can detect in the quantity that it is measuring.
questions.detailed_solution:
The resolution of a sensor is the smallest change it can detect in the
quantity that it is measuring.
.

questions.question: Transducer is a ___________ term and includes ____________.
questions.detailed_solution: Transducer is a collective term and includes both sensors and actuators.

questions.question: Which of the following is/are feature/features of sensors?

options.text: It is only sensitive to the measured property
It acts on the surrounding environment

text: It is only sensitive to the measured property

questions.detailed_solution:
It is only sensitive to the measured property. It does not influence the
measure property and does not act on the surrounding environment.
questions.answer_display: It is only sensitive to the measured property

questions.question: Which of the following technologies have unified and has resulted in the evolution of IoT?
questions.detailed_solution:
Unification of technologies which has resulted in the advancement of
IoT are -
a. Low-power embedded systems
b. Cloud Computing
c. Big Data
d. Machine Learning
e. Networking
questions.reference: See lecture 1 (Introduction to IoT - Part - I) @ 5:54

questions.question: What is the full form of IoT?
questions.detailed_solution: The full form of IoT is "Internet of Things"
questions.reference: See lecture 1 (Introduction to IoT - Part - I) @ 1:30

questions.question: A sensor node is not made up of which of the following?
questions.detailed_solution:
A sensor node is made up of a combination of sensor/sensors, a processor
unit, a radio unit, and a power unit.
questions.reference: See Page number - 101, Chapter - 5, Book - Introduction to IoT, Authors - Sudip Misra, Anandarup Mukherjee, and Arijit Roy, Publisher - Cambridge University Press, Edition - 1 (2021) Introduction to Internet of Things

questions.question: The full form of MQTT is
questions.detailed_solution: The full form of MQTT is Message Queue Telemetry Transport.
questions.reference: See lecture 6 (Basics of IoT Networking - Part II) @ 01:51

questions.question: Which of the following is NOT a method in MQTT?
questions.detailed_solution:
Following are the methods in MQTT -
a. Connect
b. Disconnect
c. Subscribe
d. Unsubscribe
e. Publish
questions.reference: See lecture 6 (Basics of IoT Networking - Part II) @ 06:18

questions.question: Which of the following is/are component/components of MQTT?
questions.detailed_solution:
The three components of MQTT are -
a) Publishers
b) Subscribers
c) Brokers
questions.reference: See lecture 6 (Basics of IoT Networking - Part II) @ 04:50

questions.question: State whether the following statement is true or false. SMQTT is an extension of MQTT which uses lightweight attribute based encryption. It has three main stages.
questions.detailed_solution:
SMQTT is an extension of MQTT which uses lightweight attribute
based encryption. It has four main stages.
questions.reference: See lecture 6 (Basics of IoT Networking - Part II) @ 13:45

questions.question: The OSI model has __________ layers.
questions.detailed_solution:
The OSI model is a conceptual framework that divides any networked
communication system into seven layers.
questions.reference: See Page number - 10, Chapter - 1, Book - Introduction to IoT, Authors - Sudip Misra, Anandarup Mukherjee, and Arijit Roy, Publisher - Cambridge University Press, Edition - 1 (2021)

questions.question: The two sub-layers of CoAP are -
questions.detailed_solution:
CoAP has two sub-layers which are -
a) Messaging
b) Request/response
questions.reference: See lecture 7 (Basics of IoT Networking - Part III) @ 04:44

questions.question: What is the full form of AMQP in the context of IoT protocol?
questions.detailed_solution: AMQP stands for Advanced Message Queuing Protocol.
questions.reference: See lecture 8 (Basics of IoT Networking - Part IV) @ 0:41

questions.question: XMPP uses the ________________ architecture.
questions.detailed_solution: XMPP uses the client-server architecture.
questions.reference: See lecture 7 (Basics of IoT Networking - Part III) @ 12:03

questions.question: How many message delivery guarantee modes are there in the AMQP protocol?
questions.detailed_solution:
There are three message delivery guarantee modes in the AMQP
protocol.
a. At-most-once
b. At-least-once
c. Exactly-once
questions.reference: See lecture 8 (Basics of IoT Networking - Part IV) @ 11:32

questions.question: Which of the following is/are NOT an AMQP frame type?
questions.detailed_solution: Open, close, and end are valid frame types of the AMQP protocol.
questions.reference: See lecture 8 (Basics of IoT Networking - Part IV) @ 06:34

questions.question: State whether the following statement is true or false. Statement: IEEE 802.15.5 was developed for low data rate monitoring and control applications and extended life low power communication uses.
questions.detailed_solution:
IEEE 802.15.4 was developed for low data rate monitoring and control
applications and extended life low power communication uses

questions.question: Which of the following is/are exchange types in AMQP?
questions.detailed_solution:
The AMQP exchange types are -
a) Direct
b) Fan-out
c) Topic
d) Header
questions.reference: See lecture 8 (Basics of IoT Networking - Part IV) @ 08:56

questions.question: State whether the following statement is True or False. Statement: The IEEE 802.15.4 operates in ISM band.
questions.detailed_solution: The IEEE 802.15.4 operates in the ISM band.

questions.question: The networking topologies supported in the IEEE 802.15.4 are -
questions.detailed_solution: The networking topologies defined in IEEE 802.15.4 are star and mesh.

questions.question: State whether the following statement is True or False. Statement: Generation of Route Requests (RREQs) by a LOADng Router for discovering a route to a destination is a valid operation of the LOADng routing protocol.
questions.detailed_solution:
Generation of Route Requests (RREQs) by a LOADng Router for
discovering a route to a destination is a valid operation of the LOADng routing protocol.
questions.reference: See lecture 10 (Connectivity Technologies - Part-II) @ 12:40 Introduction to Internet of Things

questions.question: HART operates only in __________ GHz ISM band.
questions.detailed_solution: HART operates only in 2.4 GHz ISM band.

questions.question: State whether the following statement is true or false. Statement: The HART physical layer is derived from IEEE 802.15.4 protocol and operates only in 2.5 GHz ISM band.
questions.detailed_solution:
The HART physical layer is derived from IEEE 802.15.4 protocol and
operates only in 2.4 GHz ISM band.

questions.question: State whether the following statement is True or False Statement: Each node is supervised by the application manager and it guides them on when and where to send packets.
questions.detailed_solution:
The Network manager supervises each node in the network and guides
them on when and where to send packets.

questions.question: _________________ identifies channels consistently affected by interference and removes them from use.
questions.detailed_solution:
Channel Blacklisting identifies channels consistently affected by
interference and removes them from use.

questions.question: State whether the following statement is true or false. Statement: The Network Manager supervises each node in the network and guides them on when and where to send packets.
questions.detailed_solution:
The Network manager supervises each node in the network and guides
them on when and where to send packets.

questions.question: Which layer of HART incorporates channel hopping and channel blacklisting?
questions.detailed_solution:
HART Data Link Layer incorporates channel hopping and channel
blacklisting.

questions.question: WirelessHART relies on _____________ for its communication.
questions.detailed_solution: WirelessHART relies on mesh networking.

questions.question: State whether the following statement is true or false. NFC devices work on the principle of magnetic introduction.
questions.detailed_solution: NFC devices work on the principle of magnetic induction.

questions.question: Bluetooth technology is based on Ad-hoc technology also known as ________________.
questions.detailed_solution:
Bluetooth technology is based on Ad-hoc technology also known as Ad-
hoc Piconets.

questions.question: State whether the following statement is true or false Statement: Booking in Bluetooth is the process of forming a connection between two Bluetooth devices.
questions.detailed_solution:
Paging in Bluetooth is the process of forming a connection between two
Bluetooth devices.

questions.question: State whether the following statement is true or false.
questions.code_block:
Statement: Class 1 Bluetooth radios are used primarily in industrial use cases and have a
range of 100 meters or 300 feet.
questions.detailed_solution:
Class 1 Bluetooth radios are used primarily in industrial use cases and
have a range of 100 meters or 300 feet.

questions.question: Zwave uses __________ topology.
questions.detailed_solution: Zwave uses Mesh topology.

questions.question: Which of the following is an OS for sensor nodes?
questions.detailed_solution: TinyOS is an OS for sensor nodes.

questions.question: State whether the following statement is true or false. Statement: Selfish nodes are typified by their unwillingness to cooperate, as the protocol requires whenever there is a personal cost involved.
questions.detailed_solution:
Selfish nodes are typified by their unwillingness to cooperate, as the
protocol requires whenever there is a personal cost involved.

questions.question: Dumb behavior of sensor nodes is _______________ in nature (as it is dependent on the effects of the environmental conditions).
questions.detailed_solution:
Dumb behavior of sensor nodes is Temporal in nature (as it is dependent
on the effects of the environmental conditions).

questions.question: If transmission range > 2* sensing range,
questions.detailed_solution:
If transmission range >= 2* sensing range, coverage implies
connectivity.

questions.question: What is the full form of AUV in the context of mobile wireless sensor networks?
questions.detailed_solution: The full form of AUV is Autonomous Underwater Vehicle.

questions.question: State whether the following statement is true or false. Statement: Agricultural intrusion detection uses NFC sensors.
questions.detailed_solution: Agricultural intrusion detection uses PIR and Ultrasonic sensors.

questions.question: The objective of coverage in WSN is to use a _______________ number of sensors and _______________ the network lifetime.
questions.detailed_solution:
The objective of coverage in WSN is to use minimum number of
sensors and maximize the network lifetime.

questions.question: WSN in agriculture uses what for processing?
questions.detailed_solution: WSN in agriculture uses Microcontroller for processing.

questions.question: Which of the following is/are options for communication among nanodevices?
questions.detailed_solution:
Electromagnetic and molecular are options for communication among
nanodevices

questions.question: State whether the following statement is true or false. Statement: Voluntary Sensing allows distributed sensing carried by humans and the goal is not just to collect data but to allow the common people to assess and share the knowledge.
questions.detailed_solution:
Participatory sensing allows distributed sensing carried by humans and
the goal is not just to collect data but to allow the common people to assess and share the
knowledge.

questions.question: State whether the following statement is true or false. Statement: UAV networks use a ring topology.
questions.detailed_solution:
The following are the features of UAV networks -
a. Mesh or star networks
b. Multi-tasking
c. Large coverage area

questions.question: In multi-UAV networks, the scalability is ________________.
questions.detailed_solution: In multi-UAV networks, the scalability is high.

questions.question: Single UAV system uses __________________ antenna.
questions.detailed_solution: A Single UAV system uses omnidirectional antenna.

questions.question: Which of the following is/are constraint/constraints of UAV network?
questions.detailed_solution:
Frequent link breakages and malfunction are constraints of UAV
network.

questions.question: Low-end sensor nodes are -

options.text: Whose deployment has high density in order to increase network lifetime and survivability
Who perform basic functions such as data aggregation, auto configuration, and power saving

questions.detailed_solution:
Low-end sensor nodes are -
a. Whose deployment has high density in order to increase network lifetime and
survivability.
b. Who perform basic functions such as data aggregation, auto configuration, and
power saving.

questions.question: State whether the following statement is true or false. Statement: FANETs are flying ad hoc networks.
questions.detailed_solution: FANETs are flying ad hoc networks.

questions.question: State whether the following statement is true or false Statement: SCADA is designed for isolated systems using proprietary solutions, whereas M2M is designed for cross-platform integration.
questions.detailed_solution:
SCADA is designed for isolated systems using proprietary solutions,
whereas M2M is designed for cross-platform integration.

questions.question: State whether the following statement is true or false Statement: Low-end sensor nodes are static, energy-hungry, and complex.
questions.detailed_solution: Low-end sensor nodes are static, energy-efficient and simple.

questions.question: Why interoperability in IoT is an issue?

IoT nodes are homogeneous and communicate with the same protocol

text: IoT nodes are heterogeneous hence they communicate in different protocols

questions.answer_display: IoT nodes are heterogeneous hence they communicate in different protocols

questions.question: In Python matplotlib, in order to display the graphical plot on a terminal, the command plt.plot() is used in conjunction with which of the following?
The following Python code displays a parabolic plot using matplotlib.
questions.code_block:
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
x = np.linspace(-10, 10, 400)
y = x**2
plt.figure(figsize=(8, 6))
plt.xlabel("x", fontname="Times New Roman", fontsize=12)
plt.ylabel("y", fontname="Times New Roman", fontsize=12)
plt.title("Plot of a Parabola: y = x²", fontname="Times New Roman", fontsize=14)
plt.grid(True)
plt.legend(loc="upper left")
plt.axhline(0, color='black', linewidth=0.5) # x-axis
plt.axvline(0, color='black', linewidth=0.5) # y-axis
plt.show()
Observe the code very carefully. Will the code plot the desired parabola?
questions.detailed_solution: plt.plot() is not included which is the principal method to plot any graph.

questions.question: With respect to the above Question (Question 4), which the must be added to make the code display the parabola?
questions.detailed_solution:
plt.plot() is not included which is the principal method to plot any
graph.

than public cloud.

questions.question: In cloud computing, the users have specific knowledge about the exact physical location of the computing hardware with respect to the cloud services.
questions.detailed_solution:

hardware orchestration and management.

questions.question: GreenCloud implementation focuses most on which of the following aspects?

questions.question: Which of the following takes the decision whether the data should be provided directly to the end user or is it required to re-cache the data from external cache?
questions.detailed_solution:
Internal Cache takes the decision whether the data should be provided
directly to the end user or is it required to re-cache the data from external cache.

questions.question: Fill in the blanks The __________ extends the cloud nearer the IoT devices.
questions.detailed_solution:
Fogging or fog computing extends the cloud nearer the IoT
devices .

questions.question: Which of the following is/are the types of data with respect to sensitivity.
questions.detailed_solution:
Time-sensitive, less time-sensitive and not time-sensitive are the types
of data with respect to sensitivity.

questions.question: Who coined the term Fog computing?
questions.detailed_solution: CISCO coined the term Fog computing.

questions.question: What of the following is an advantage of fog computing ?
questions.detailed_solution: Fog computing supports anywhere deployability and mobility.

questions.question: State True or False Openstack is an open-source software.
questions.detailed_solution: Openstack is an open-source software.

questions.question: To what are the fog nodes connected to?
questions.detailed_solution: The fog nodes are connected to the IoT devices and Cloud.

questions.question: Which of the following reduces danger and increases output?
questions.detailed_solution:
Dynamic analysis and decision making reduces danger and
increases output.

questions.question: Fill in the blanks. Fog computing is an intermediate layer between __________ and _________.
questions.detailed_solution:
Fog computing is an intermediate layer between Cloud and
devices.

questions.question: Unnecessary sensing causes energy consumption.
questions.detailed_solution: Unnecessary sensing causes energy consumption.

questions.question: Which of the following is used by the fog applications to increase the speed of service accessibility?
questions.detailed_solution:
Accelerators increase the speed of service accessibility. (Please
refer to Page 260, Chapter 11, Introduction to IoT. S. Misra, A. Mukherjee, and A.
Roy, 2020. Cambridge University Press.)
_________________________________________________________________________

questions.question: Fill in the blank. The concept of ________ enables physical hardware to be shared among multiple entities.
questions.detailed_solution:
The concept of hardware virtualization enables physical hardware
to be shared among multiple entities. (Please refer to Page 262, Chapter 11,
Introduction to IoT. S. Misra, A. Mukherjee, and A. Roy, 2020. Cambridge
University Press.)
___________________________________________________________________
Introduction to Internet of
Things

questions.question: DLNA (used in HAN standards) expands to:
questions.detailed_solution: DLNA = Digital Living Network Alliance.

questions.question: Which property best characterizes V2X?
questions.detailed_solution: V2X follows a distributed architecture.

questions.question: Which set correctly captures smart-home functionality?
questions.detailed_solution: Smart homes include both health monitoring and security.

questions.question: Which are valid types of sensing?
questions.detailed_solution: Sensing can be stationary or mobile.

questions.question: Which layers are part of the Zigbee stack?
questions.detailed_solution: Zigbee includes Physical, MAC, and Network layers.

questions.question: Smart parking primarily reduces traffic ________.
questions.detailed_solution: Smart parking reduces traffic congestion.

questions.question: About Home Area Network (HAN), consider: I) Multi-protocol gateway bridges non-IP to IP. II) Wired HAN is low cost. III) Wireless HAN makes implementation easy. Which of these is correct?
questions.detailed_solution: All three are correct per lecture context.

questions.question: Which statements about smart health are true? I) Low-cost and portable II) Allows remote check- ups and diagnosis III) Effortless health monitoring
questions.detailed_solution: All listed properties were highlighted in lecture.

questions.question: Phases of Intelligent Connected Vehicle (ICV) development include:
questions.detailed_solution: Three phases as listed.

questions.question: In the Ad-hoc domain of VANET, vehicles are:
questions.detailed_solution: Vehicles are mobile in the ad-hoc domain.

questions.question: Domains of VANET include:
questions.detailed_solution: In-vehicle and Ad-hoc are VANET domains (per the lecture scope).

questions.question: At which data fusion stage are multiple classifier outputs combined?
questions.detailed_solution: Ensemble of decisions happens at the decision level.

questions.question: The Body & Brain Architecture consists of how many layers?
questions.detailed_solution: It consists of three layers.

questions.question: Which statement about smart home infrastructure is correct?

options.text: It may include wired and/or wireless devices

text: It may include wired and/or wireless devices

questions.detailed_solution: Smart homes can use wired and/or wireless devices.
questions.answer_display: It may include wired and/or wireless devices

questions.question: Intelligent Connected Vehicles (ICV) communication is based on:
questions.detailed_solution: ICV is based on DSRC.

questions.question: What are some of the other names of the smart grids?
questions.detailed_solution:
Smart grids are also known as Electricity with a brain, Energy internet, and
Electronet.

questions.question: Which of the following is not done in traditional electrical grids?
questions.detailed_solution:
In Traditional electrical grids, the energy generation is done in centralised
power plants.

questions.question: Which of the following is a benefit associated with smart grids for customers?
questions.detailed_solution:
Smart Grids provide different pricing options for customers, lower
electricity rates and Improved security.

questions.question: Fill in the blank. ___________ samples voltage and current with a fixed sample rate at the installed location.
questions.detailed_solution:
PMUs or Phasor Measurement Unit samples voltage and current
with a fixed sample rate at the installed location

questions.question: Which of the following statements are true about MDMSs? Statement I: Decide the price per unit energy to be paid by the customers Statement II: Handled by the energy service providers Statement III: Aggregate the energy consumption or energy request of certain geographical area
questions.detailed_solution:
The Meter Data Management Systems (MDMS) decide the price
per unit energy to be paid by the customers AND are handled by the energy service
providers.
questions.reference: (Please refer Lecture 52@16:02) Detailed Solution: In islanding, a home can have power from distributed resources.(Please refer Lecture 51 @31:20)

questions.question: Which of the following aggregate the energy consumption or energy request of a certain geographical area?
questions.detailed_solution:
DAUs aggregate the energy consumption or energy request of a
certain geographical area.

questions.question: Which of the following statements are true about Dynamic System Attacks? Statement I: Replay attacks compromises sensors and monitors their outputs. Statement II: D-DIA can lead to a system collapse. Statement III: Covert attack is a closed loop version of replay attacks.
questions.detailed_solution:
Replay attacks compromises sensors and monitors their outputs. D-
DIA can lead to a system collapse. Covert attack is a closed loop version of replay
attacks.

questions.question: Fill in the blank. ____________ is performed by compromising the availability of the grid component.
questions.detailed_solution:
Denial of service is performed by compromising the availability of
the grid component.

questions.question: Fill in the blank. ____________ is a primary challenge in IIoT.

options.text: Integrate existing infrastructure into new IIoT infrastructure

text: Integrate existing infrastructure into new IIoT infrastructure

questions.detailed_solution:
Integrate existing infrastructure into new IIoT infrastructure is one
of the primary challenges of IIoT.
questions.answer_display: Integrate existing infrastructure into new IIoT infrastructure

questions.question: Fill in the blank. ____________ is based on a wrap and re-use approach.
questions.detailed_solution: IIoT is based on the wrap and re-use approach.

questions.question: Mechanized production is a part of the 4th Industrial Revolution.
questions.detailed_solution: Mechanized production is a part of the 1st Industrial Revolution.

questions.question: Which of the following happened in the 3rd Revolution?
questions.detailed_solution:
Internet evolution and automation happened in the 3rd
Revolution.

questions.question: Which of the following is not a vulnerability of Smart Grid?
questions.detailed_solution:
Integrity, physical threats and dynamic system attacks are all the
vulnerabilities of smart grids

questions.question: Big data is characterized by 7 Vs.
questions.detailed_solution: Big data is characterized by 7 Vs.

questions.question: What is the Flow of data?
questions.detailed_solution:
The flow of the data is Generation, Acquisition, Storage and
Analysis

questions.question: The two types of data analysis are _____________.
questions.detailed_solution: Qualitative and Quantitative are the two types of data analysis.

questions.question: Fill in the blank. To perform an ANOVA, we must have a _______ response variable and at least one _____ factor.
questions.detailed_solution:
To perform an ANOVA, we must have a continuous response variable and at
least one categorical factor.

questions.question: Select the statement(s) that denote the type of ANOVA. Statement I: One way analysis Statement II: Two way analysis Statement III: K-way analysis
questions.detailed_solution:
The types of ANOVA includes One way analysis, Two way analysis and K-
way analysis

questions.question: What is the type of the data dispersion?
questions.detailed_solution:
Range, average absolute deviation and variation are the type of data
dispersions.

questions.question: The two most relevant sensors directly used in agricultures are __________.

options.text: Soil moisture and water level sensor
ECG sensor and water level sensor

text: Soil moisture and water level sensor

questions.detailed_solution:
Soil moisture and water level sensors are the necessary sensors
generally used in agriculture.
questions.answer_display: Soil moisture and water level sensor

questions.question: The mathematical equation that is formulated in the form of relationships between variables is known as __________.
questions.detailed_solution:
The mathematical equation that is formulated in the form of
relationships between variables is known as Statistical model

questions.question: What are the two types of statistical models?
questions.detailed_solution: Complete and incomplete are two types of statistical models

questions.question: Select the correct order of the component layers present in the IoT healthcare.

options.text: Sensing layer, cloud platform layer, aggregated layer, processing layer
Sensing layer, aggregated layer, processing layer, cloud platform layer
Aggregated layer, sensing layer, processing layer, cloud platform layer
Sensing layer, processing layer, aggregated layer, cloud platform layer

text: Sensing layer, aggregated layer, processing layer, cloud platform layer

questions.detailed_solution:
The sensing layer senses data and transmit it o the aggregation layer where
the data are aggregated. The aggregated layer further transfers the data to the processing layer
the data are processed and final sent to the cloud platform.
questions.answer_display: Sensing layer, aggregated layer, processing layer, cloud platform layer

questions.question: Wireless IoT driven solutions for remote healthcare facility provisioning brings healthcare to patients than bringing patients to healthcare.
questions.detailed_solution:
In IoT healthcare, wireless IoT driven solutions brings healthcare to patients
than bringing patients to healthcare.

questions.question: Which of the following handheld devices are used for activity monitoring?
questions.detailed_solution:
High end smartphones are likely to have accelerometer, compass, and
gyroscope.

questions.question: Which of the following are components of IoT?
questions.detailed_solution:
Sensing layer, Aggregated layer, Processing layer and cloud
platform are components of IoT.

questions.question: By performing continuous monitoring of a person's activity, it is not possible to observe his/her behavior or to identify any repetitive pattern in his/her day-to-day activity.
questions.detailed_solution:
Continuous monitoring of activity results in daily observations
of human behavior and repetitive patterns in their activity.

questions.question: Deep learning based data analysis cannot be performed on videos
questions.detailed_solution:
Deep learning based data analysis can be done on sensor
data, images and videos.

questions.question: Which of the following are the inbuilt sensors that are present in high end smartphones?
questions.detailed_solution:
High end smartphones are likely to have accelerometer,
compass, and gyroscope.

questions.question: Fill in the blank. Processing the handheld activity device data with artificial intelligence can be used for ________.
questions.detailed_solution:
Processing the handheld activity device data with artificial intelligence can be
used for detecting sudden fall of a person.

source_name: NPTEL - Introduction to Internet of Things

exam_pattern.practice_scoring_model: 1 mark per question inside this practice app

certification_weightage_hint.course_note: NPTEL course pages show that best-assignment aggregation varies by course, while certification commonly uses 25% assignment and 75% proctored exam weightage.
